==========================================================
#Title: "Flight Delay Analysis using R"
#Author: "Aishwarya Mohan Chaudhari"
#Dataset: flights dataset
==========================================================

#Loading required packages
install.packages('nycflights13')
install.packages('tidyverse')
library(nycflights13)
library(tidyverse)

#Loading dataset of interest
data(flights)

#Exploring the dataset
head(flights,10) # First 10 rows of the data
summary(flights) # 6 point summary of all columns
str(flights) # datatypes of all variables
dim(flights) #dimension: number of rows and columns

----------------------------------------------------------

#Part 1: Understanding the Data

colnames(flights)# all column headers in the dataset

flights[,c("dep_delay", "arr_delay", "dep_time", "arr_time", "air_time", "distance", "flight", "carrier", "origin", "time_hour" )] #visualizing specific columns only


str(flights) #datatypes of all variables
sum(is.na(flights)) #sum of all null values in the dataset
colSums(is.na(flights))# sum of null values by column

-----------------------------------------------------------

#Part 2: Numerical Summaries of Delays


#For dep_delay variable
mean(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
median(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

#For arr_delay variable
mean(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
median(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
IQR(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)


#Delay summary across carrier
library(dplyr)
flights %>% #grouping departure delay and arrival delay by carrier
group_by (carrier) %>%
summarise(avg_dep_delay = mean(dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE), avg_arr_delay = mean(dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE))

#Delay summary across origin
flights %>% #grouping departure delay and arrival delay by origin
group_by (origin) %>%
summarise(avg_dep_delay = mean(dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE), avg_arr_delay = mean(arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE))


#Delay summary across Time(Monthly)
flights %>%  #grouping departure delay and arrival delay by month
group_by (month) %>%
summarise(avg_dep_delay = mean(dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE), avg_arr_delay = mean(arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE))


#skewness plot for departure delays

install.packages("ggplot2")
library(ggplot2)

mean_delay = mean(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
median_delay = median(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(flights,aes(dep_delay)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "grey", col = "black") +
  ggtitle("Histogram of Departure delay variable showing skewness") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50, 200)) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_delay, colour = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = median_delay, colour = "Median"), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Central Tendency", values = c("Mean" = "blue", "Median" = "red"))
  
#mean median difference
mean(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE) - median(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
  
#skewness plot for arrival delays

mean_arrival = mean(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
median_arrival = median(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(flights, aes(arr_delay)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "grey", col = "black") +
  ggtitle("Histogram of Arrival delay variable showing skewness") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50, 200)) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_delay, colour = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = median_delay, colour = "Median"), linetype = "dashed", sized = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Central Tendency", values = c("Mean" = "blue", "Median" = "red"))

#mean median difference
mean(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE) - median(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

#Outliers of Departure delay variable
Q1 = quantile(flights$dep_delay, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE) # will give 25th percentile of departure delay value
Q3 = quantile(flights$dep_delay, probs = 0.75, na.rm  = TRUE) # will give 75th percentile of departure delay value
IQR = IQR(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE) #calculating Interquartile range
Q1
Q3
IQR
Lower_value = Q1 - 1.5*IQR # lower threshold value 
Higher_value = Q3 + 1.5*IQR # higher threshold value
Lower_value
Higher_value

outliers_lower = flights$dep_delay[flights$dep_delay < Lower_value] # All values less than lower threshold value
outlier_upper = flights$dep_delay[flights$dep_delay > Higher_value] # All values greater than higher threshold value
outliers_lower
outliers_upper

sum(flights$dep_delay < Lower_value, na.rm = TRUE) #sum of lower outliers
sum(flights$dep_delay > Higher_value, na.rm = TRUE) #sum of higher outliers

#Outliers of Arrival delay variable
Q1 = quantile(flights$arr_delay, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE) # will give 25th percentile of arrival delay value
Q3 = quantile(flights$arr_delay, probs = 0.75, na.rm  = TRUE) # will give 75th percentile of arrival delay value
IQR = IQR(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE) #calculating Interquartile range
Q1
Q3
IQR
Lower_value = Q1 - 1.5*IQR #lower threshold value 
Higher_value = Q3 + 1.5*IQR # higher threshold value
Lower_value
Higher_value

outliers_lower = flights$arr_delay[flights$arr_delay < Lower_value] # All values less than lower threshold value
outlier_upper = flights$arr_delay[flights$arr_delay > Higher_value] # All values greater than higher threshold value
outliers_lower
outliers_upper

sum(flights$arr_delay < Lower_value, na.rm = TRUE) #sum of lower outliers
sum(flights$arr_delay > Higher_value, na.rm = TRUE) #sum of higher outliers

--------------------------------------------------------

#Part 3: Graphical Analysis


#histogram of Departure delay
ggplot(flights, aes(dep_delay)) + geom_histogram(bins = 50) + ggtitle("Histogram of Departure delays") + coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50,200))

#histogram of Arrival delay
ggplot(flights,aes(arr_delay)) + geom_histogram(bins = 50) + ggtitle("Histogram of Arrival delays") + coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50,200))



#Departure delay vs Airlines
ggplot(flights,aes(x = factor(carrier),y = dep_delay)) + 
  geom_boxplot(fill = "white", color = "black") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-50,50))
  labs(title = "Box plot of departure delay vs Airlines", x = "Airlines", y = "Departure delay")
  
#Arrival delay vs Airlines
ggplot(flights,aes(x = factor(carrier), y = arr_delay)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "white", color = "black") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-50, 100))
  labs(title = "Box plot of arrival delay as Airlines", x = "Airlines", y = "Arrival delay")


#Time-based visualization (Monthly)

library(dplyr)

monthly_delay <- flights %>%
   group_by(month) %>%
   summarise(avg_dep_delay = mean(dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE),           
   avg_arr_delay = mean(arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE))
   
ggplot(monthly_delay,aes(x = month)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = avg_dep_delay, color = "Departure Delay")) +
  geom_line(aes(y = avg_arr_delay, color = "Arrival Delay")) +
  labs(title = "Monthly Trend of Flight Delays", x = "Month", y = "Average Delay (minutes)", color = "Delay Type")


#Visualization of choice: Boxplot by Month

#Departure Delay vs Month
ggplot(flights, aes(x = factor(month), y = dep_delay)) +
   geom_boxplot() +
   coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-50, 100))
   labs(title = "Monthly Distribution of Departure delays", x = "Month", y = "Departure Delay")
  
#Arrival Delay vs Month
ggplot(flights, aes(x = factor(month), y = arr_delay)) +
   geom_boxplot() +
   coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-50, 100))
   labs(title = "Monthly Distribution of Arrival delays", x = "Month", y = "Arrival Delay")


#Misleading Visualization

#For Departure delay (Skewness) 

mean_delay = mean(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
median_delay = median(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(flights,aes(dep_delay)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 5, fill = "grey", col = "black") +
  ggtitle("Histogram of Departure delay variable showing skewness") +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_delay, colour = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = median_delay, colour = "Median"), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Central Tendency", values = c("Mean" = "blue", "Median" = "red"))

  
#For Arrival delay (Skewness) 

mean_arrival = mean(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
median_arrival = median(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(flights, aes(arr_delay)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 5, fill = "grey", col = "black") +
  ggtitle("Histogram of Arrival delay variable showing skewness") +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = mean_delay, colour = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = median_delay, colour = "Median"), linetype = "dashed", sized = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Central Tendency", values = c("Mean" = "blue", "Median" = "red"))
  
-----------------------------------------------------------

#Part 4: Distribution and Standardization


#z scores of Departure delays
mean_delay <- mean(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_delay <- sd(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

Z_score_dep_delay <- (flights$dep_delay - mean_delay) / sd_delay
Z_score_dep_delay

#z scores of Arrival delays
mean_delay <- mean(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_delay <- sd(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

Z_score_arr_delay <- (flights$arr_delay - mean_delay) / sd_delay
Z_score_arr_delay

#For Departure delay
Mean = mean(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
Standard_deviation = sd(flights$dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

Threshold_dep_delay = Mean + 2*Standard_deviation
Threshold_dep_delay

sum(flights$dep_delay > Threshold_dep_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

#For Arrival delay
Mean = mean(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)
Standard_deviation = sd(flights$arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

Threshold_arr_delay = Mean + 2*Standard_deviation
Threshold_arr_delay

sum(flights$arr_delay > Threshold_arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)

----------------------------------------------------------------
